performance.page_load: < 2 seconds on device (offline-first, no network dependency)

requirements: Passwords must be hashed and stored securely on local device
Only Owner can create/manage user accounts
Session timeout after period of inactivity
Tablet-first UI design optimized for touch interaction
Must work on smartphone screens as fallback
Large touch targets for busy restaurant environment
Simple and intuitive UI for staff with medium tech comfort
Minimal steps to complete common tasks (order, pay, update status)
Bahasa Indonesia as primary language for UI

reliability.backup: Local data backup with cloud sync when internet available
requirements: System must function fully offline — all core features work without internet
Data persists locally on device even after app restart
Auto-sync to cloud/server when internet connection is available
No data loss during offline-to-online transition

integrations.name: Thermal Receipt Printer
integrations.description: Support for Bluetooth or USB thermal receipt printers for printing customer receipts

requirements: Offline-first architecture — all data stored locally on device
Local database on device (e.g., SQLite, IndexedDB, or equivalent)
Cloud sync layer for backup and multi-device sync when online
Must work for street food vendors with no stable internet access
Lightweight — must run smoothly on mid-range Android tablets and smartphones
